summary: A superb matrix mix that immerses listeners in the performance, delivering crystal‑clear sound from both board and audience.
review: Reviewers rave about the quality of this matrix patch, noting how the blend of soundboard and audience channels puts you right in the middle of the venue. While no specific songs or musical moments are called out, the excitement expressed suggests a beloved show captured with excellent recording technique.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave high star ratings (4‑5) and praised the matrix mix, indicating both strong musical appeal and top‑notch recording quality despite limited detail on performance specifics.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the matrix patch as immersive and crystal‑clear, with a perfect blend of soundboard and audience ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic comments but no concrete details on set structure; reviewers simply love the show overall.
